query: SELECT o.id, o.driver_id, d.id as drivers_table_id, d.user_id, d.display_number FROM orders o LEFT JOIN drivers d ON d.user_id = o.driver_id WHERE o.driver_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT o.id, o.driver_id, d.id as drivers_table_id, d.user_id, d.display_number FROM orders o LEFT JOIN drivers d ON d.user_id = o.driver_id WHERE o.driver_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;
